metadata.description: Security skill pack for shipping MVPs without shipping a breach.

plugins.name: vun-skill-pack
plugins.description: Pre-launch security gate: secrets scan, attack-surface mapping, data-flow tracing, vuln scanning, guided fixes, launch triage, plus an appsec agent and footgun guides for Next.js/Vercel, Supabase, Stripe, Node/Express. Defensive review only.
